entries.description: TRANSCRIPT DESIGNATION by Defendant KalshiEX,LLC re 47 Notice of Appeal,, 41 Motion Hearing,,,, 51 Transcript,,. (Williams, Paul) (Entered: 03/17/2026)

ORDER  Denying  49   Motion to Stay Case, Denying as moot  56   Motion for Temporary Restraining Order and  60   Motion to Strike.   It is further  ordered that this case is remanded to the First Judicial Court of Nevada,  Carson City.  The Clerk  of Court is directed to notify the state court that this Court no  longer has  jurisdiction over this action, and to close this case.      Signed by Judge Miranda M. Du on 3/12/2026.    (Copies have been distributed pursuant to the NEF; CC: Certified copy of order and docket  sheet mailed to First Judicial Court of Nevada,  Carson City - MAM)

TRANSCRIPT of Proceedings, 41 Motion Hearing,,,, held on 2-24-26, before Judge Miranda M. Du. Court Reporter/Transcriber: Kathy French, Kathy_French@nvd.uscourts.gov. Any Redaction Request is due by 3/26/2026. Release of the Transcript Restriction is set for 6/3/2026. Before release date, the transcript may be viewed at the court public terminal or purchased through the court reporter. After release date, it may be obtained through the court reporter or PACER. THIS TRANSCRIPT MUST NOT BE ATTACHED AS AN EXHIBIT OR MADE PART OF AN APPENDIX. See Local Rule IA 10-3.(b). (KF) (Entered: 03/05/2026)
STATEMENT REGARDING REMOVAL by Defendant KalshiEX,LLC. (Williams, Paul) (Entered: 03/05/2026)

MINUTE ORDER IN CHAMBERS of the Honorable Judge Miranda M. Du on 3/4/2026. The Court has reviewed Defendants emergency motion for a stay pending appeal of order granting motion to remand (ECF No. 49 ), and the Court finds that good cause exists to consider the motion on an emergency basis. The Court will therefore adopt Defendants proposed briefing schedule. Plaintiff has up to and including March 6, 2026, to file its response and Defendant has up to and including March 9, 2026, to file its reply. Because the remand order has been forwarded to the state court, the Court recalls the remand order and directs the Clerk of Court to notify the state court that this Court has resumed jurisdiction over the action for the time being. Defendants previously filed emergency motion for administrative stay (ECF No. 46 ) is denied as moot. (no image attached) (Copies have been distributed pursuant to the NEF - LJ) Modified on 3/4/2026 at link (KW). (Entered: 03/04/2026)
